mapper.select:
SELECT ot.onboarding_template_id AS template_id, ot.name, ot.description, ot.status, ot.template_kind, ot.department_type_code, ot.level, ot.created_at, ot.updated_at, COUNT(DISTINCT ct.checklist_template_id) AS checklist_count, COUNT(DISTINCT tt.task_template_id) AS task_count, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.company_id) AS used_by_company_count FROM onboarding_templates ot LEFT JOIN checklist_templates ct ON ct.onboarding_template_id = ot.onboarding_template_id AND COALESCE(ct.status, '') != 'DELETED' LEFT JOIN task_templates tt ON tt.checklist_template_id = ct.checklist_template_id AND COALESCE(tt.status, '') != 'DELETED' LEFT JOIN onboarding_instances oi ON oi.onboarding_template_id = ot.onboarding_template_id WHERE
GROUP BY ot.onboarding_template_id, ot.name, ot.description, ot.status, ot.template_kind, ot.department_type_code, ot.level, ot.created_at, ot.updated_at ORDER BY ot.updated_at DESC, ot.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM onboarding_templates ot WHERE
